## EVENT TIMELINE chart, ABRID style

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Every position, size, and color below is exact. No adjectives, no improvisation.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-TIM-15",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "schedule",
    "status"
  ],
  "form": "horizontal axis with dated milestone markers",
  "data_required": "3-8 dated events positioned 0-100 along an axis with start/end labels",
  "family": "TIM",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-TIM-09 (durations, not moments)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "events have durations",
      "use": "CH-TIM-09"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- milestone communication: what happens when, on one line
- kickoffs, gates, energization dates, handovers

Do NOT use when:
- tasks with durations and dependencies (CH-TIM-09 GANTT)
- more than 8 events (split by phase)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title naming the critical date",
  "eyebrow": "caps, DL chrome only",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "axis": "{start_label, end_label}",
  "events": "array of {label, sub (date), pos 0-100, kind: event|milestone|critical}"
}
```

```json
  "canvas": {

  },

      "x": 32,

      "left": 96,
      "right": 864
    },

    "axis_label": {
      "size": 10,
      "offset": 24
    },
    "leader": 40,
    "event_label": {
      "size": 12,
      "sub_size": 10
    }
  },
  "scale": {
    "note": "pos is 0-100 along the axis; labels alternate above/below by index; anchors clamp at the edges (pos<=10 start, >=90 end)"
  }
}
```

### Rules
- labels alternate above and below the axis, deterministically by index
- milestones are diamonds, events are dots, critical items take the negative role
- every event carries its date
- 8 events maximum

### Never do this
- curved journey arrows
- icons instead of markers
- more than 8 events on one axis
- undated events

### QA before delivering
- [ ] every event dated
- [ ] events <= 8
- [ ] critical items named in the title
- [ ] source present

| Element | Color |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| axis | `#C9D2CC` |
| axis_label | `#3E4C46` |
| leader | `#C9D2CC` |
| kind_event | `#A7C4B5` |
| kind_milestone | `#197A56` |
| kind_critical | `#9E2B25` |
| label | `#0E3A2C` |
| sub | `#3E4C46` |
| title | `#0E3A2C` |
| source | `#3E4C46` |

### Fonts

- Title font: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 700
- All other text: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400 (600 on highlighted items)

### Language chrome

No kicker, no eyebrow; title at the default y.
